items.title_en: China industrial profits stay resilient as economy leans on factories, exports
items.title_zh: 由于经济依赖工厂和出口，中国工业利润保持弹性
items.desc_en: China's economic growth remains fragile, hobbled by a prolonged property downturn and deep structural imbalances.
items.desc_zh: 中国的经济增长仍然脆弱，受到长期房地产低迷和严重结构性失衡的阻碍。

items.title_en: Saudi Aramco resumes oil loading at Ras Tanura in boost to supply
items.title_zh: 沙特阿美公司恢复拉斯坦努拉石油装载以增加供应
items.desc_en: The Saudi oil loadings come even though a ship belonging to Taiwan's Evergreen Marine was hit by an unknown object in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday.
items.desc_zh: 尽管台湾长荣海运的一艘船周四在霍尔木兹海峡被不明物体击中，但沙特的石油仍在装载。

items.title_en: Venezuela quake toll tops 900, search intensifies for hundreds trapped
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数突破900人 加紧搜救数百名被困人员
items.desc_en: Frustration has mounted over the uneven pace of relief in some of the hardest-hit areas.
items.desc_zh: 在一些受灾最严重的地区，救援进度参差不齐，令人沮丧不已。

items.title_en: From concerts to train rides, bots are winning the ticket wars — but they're only part of the problem
items.title_zh: 从音乐会到火车旅行，机器人正在赢得门票大战——但这只是问题的一部分
items.desc_en: From concerts to train reservations, automated bots have become the latest target in the fight against ticket scalping.
items.desc_zh: 从音乐会到火车预订，自动化机器人已成为打击倒票行为的最新目标。

items.title_en: Red-alert heatwaves are becoming Europe's new normal. Investors are paying attention
items.title_zh: 红色警报热浪正在成为欧洲的新常态。投资者正在关注
items.desc_en: Temperature records were smashed across Europe this week, prompting several countries across the continent to issued high-level warnings about danger to life.
items.desc_zh: 本周，欧洲各地的气温记录被打破，促使欧洲大陆的几个国家发布了生命危险的高级警告。

items.title_en: Billionaire Leon Black walks out of Epstein investigation hearing
items.title_zh: 亿万富翁莱昂·布莱克退出爱泼斯坦调查听证会
items.desc_en: The House panel then issued subpoenas demanding the private equity tycoon, who co-founded Apollo Global Management, testify on camera and under oath.
items.desc_zh: 众议院小组随后发出传票，要求这位阿波罗全球管理公司联合创始人的私募股权大亨在镜头前宣誓作证。

items.title_en: Pete Buttigieg briefly separated from children after false police report
items.title_zh: 警方虚假报告后，皮特·布蒂吉格与孩子们短暂分离
items.desc_en: Buttigieg says the day he spent separated from his twins was "among the darkest hours of my life".
items.desc_zh: 布蒂吉格说，他与双胞胎分开的那一天是“我一生中最黑暗的时刻之一”。

items.title_en: Religion row as Texas makes Bible stories required reading in schools
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州规定学校必须阅读圣经故事，引发宗教争议
items.desc_en: Critics say the new reading requirements infringe on religious freedoms and blur the separation of church and state.
items.desc_zh: 批评者称，新的阅读要求侵犯了宗教自由，并模糊了教会与国家的分离。

items.title_en: SpaceX will join Nasdaq-100
items.title_zh: SpaceX 将加入纳斯达克 100 指数
items.desc_en: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
items.desc_zh: 如此迅速地加入 SpaceX 将使埃隆·马斯克公司成为纳斯达克最近采用的快速纳入框架的首批受益者之一。

items.title_en: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies: Reports
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府允许 Anthropic 向一些公司、政府机构发布 Mythos AI 模型：报告
items.desc_en: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 禁止访问其《神鬼寓言 5》和《神话 5》模型，以遵守政府引用“国家安全当局”的出口管制指令。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers
items.title_zh: 为什么《GTA 6》将在没有光盘的情况下启动 - 这对游戏玩家意味着什么
items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？

items.title_en: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
items.title_zh: 梅洛尼和特朗普：事实证明，这是一个非常公开的分歧，很难修复
items.desc_en: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.
items.desc_zh: 意大利总理不久前还被称为“特朗普耳语者”，但他们的关系却从公开攻击变成了人身侮辱。

items.title_en: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 特朗普指责德黑兰违反霍尔木兹海峡停火协议后，美国对伊朗进行打击
items.desc_en: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.
items.desc_zh: 这次袭击发生之际，美国和伊朗本应在 60 年内没有敌对行动，并举行会谈以结束战争。

items.title_en: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as families desperate for news
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震已造成 920 人死亡，家人急于得到消息
items.desc_en: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as international rescue teams start to arrive.
items.desc_zh: 随着国际救援队开始抵达，数百人仍被困在废墟下。

items.title_en: U.S. crude oil falls below $70, resuming losses after attack on cargo ship near Oman
items.title_zh: 阿曼附近货船遇袭后，美国原油跌破70美元，重拾跌势
items.desc_en: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while absorbing a flurry of Persian Gulf news.
items.desc_zh: 周五油价延续跌势，市场关注中东冲突的进一步突破，同时吸收一系列波斯湾消息。

items.title_en: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
items.title_zh: 货船遇袭后美国对伊朗实施打击
items.desc_en: US Central Command says it has struck missile and drone storage facilities and coastal radar positions.
items.desc_zh: 美国中央司令部表示，它已经袭击了导弹和无人机储存设施以及沿海雷达阵地。

items.title_en: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能融资担忧升级，甲骨文股价遭遇 2001 年互联网泡沫破灭以来最糟糕的一周
items.desc_en: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.
items.desc_zh: 甲骨文激增的支出、负自由现金流和 1,300 亿美元的债务正在给该股带来压力。

items.title_en: Israel and Lebanon sign framework agreement after US-brokered talks
items.title_zh: 以色列和黎巴嫩在美国斡旋会谈后签署框架协议
items.desc_en: Previous ceasefires between Israel and Hezbollah have still seen near-daily cross-border strikes
items.desc_zh: 此前以色列和真主党之间的停火仍然几乎每天都会发生跨境袭击

items.title_en: Wall Street is set to close the books on a memorable first half next week. Here's what's ahead
items.title_zh: 华尔街将于下周结束令人难忘的上半年。这是接下来的事情
items.desc_en: The view is more rosy than investors could've been expected, as they wrap up the month, quarter, and first half of 2026 next week.
items.desc_zh: 随着下周对 2026 年月份、季度和上半年的总结，这种观点比投资者的预期更为乐观。

items.title_en: World Cup fans frustrated by 'confusing and expensive' tipping culture in US
items.title_zh: 世界杯球迷对美国“令人困惑且昂贵”的小费文化感到沮丧
items.desc_en: International fans visiting the US for the World Cup have become frustrated by the culture of having to tip servers, telling the BBC that tipping fatigue has set in.
items.desc_zh: 前往美国观看世界杯的国际球迷对必须给服务员小费的文化感到沮丧，他们告诉英国广播公司，给小费的疲劳已经开始出现。

items.title_en: A breakout could be in the cards for this biopharmaceutical play, says Carter Worth
items.title_zh: 卡特沃斯表示，这种生物制药业务可能会取得突破
items.desc_en: Shares of Incyte are now moving out of a seven-month range.
items.desc_zh: Incyte 的股价现已脱离七个月区间。

items.title_en: Europe's deadly heatwave breaks German record and halts public events
items.title_zh: 欧洲致命热浪打破德国记录并导致公共活动暂停
items.desc_en: Germany's highest ever temperature of 41.3C is recorded provisionally in Saarbrücken, over the border from France.
items.desc_zh: 德国有史以来最高气温为 41.3 摄氏度，暂时记录在与法国接壤的萨尔布吕肯。

items.title_en: DR Congo takes Rwanda to international court over decades of conflict
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国就数十年冲突将卢旺达告上国际法庭
items.desc_en: Kinshasa accuses its neighbour of committing various violations since the 1994 Rwanda genocide.
items.desc_zh: 金沙萨指责其邻国自 1994 年卢旺达种族灭绝以来犯下各种违法行为。

items.title_en: OpenAI limits new AI models to 'trusted partners' at request of U.S. government
items.title_zh: 应美国政府要求，OpenAI 将新的人工智能模型限制为“值得信赖的合作伙伴”
items.desc_en: OpenAI said it previewed the new models' capabilities with the government ahead of the launch.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 表示，它在发布前与政府预览了新模型的功能。

items.title_en: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震中母亲救女儿身亡
items.desc_en: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 589 people.
items.desc_zh: 埃克托·贝洛在社交媒体上写道，在这场造成至少 589 人死亡的地震中，“你们为我们的女儿献出了自己的生命”。

items.title_en: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified documents
items.title_zh: 前特朗普顾问约翰·博尔顿承认不当处理机密文件
items.desc_en: Bolton faces a prison sentence of up to five years and has agreed to pay $2.25m in fine, prosecutors say.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，博尔顿面临最高五年的监禁，并同意支付 225 万美元的罚款。

items.title_en: OpenAI hasn't held pre-IPO investor meetings or set timeline yet, sources say
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，OpenAI 尚未召开 IPO 前投资者会议或设定时间表
items.desc_en: OpenAI said it confidentially filed its prospectus with the SEC earlier this month, but noted it "may be a while" before it goes public.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 表示，该公司本月早些时候向 SEC 秘密提交了招股说明书，但指出“可能需要一段时间”才能公开。

items.title_en: Four men held over child marriage in Sierra Leone appear in landmark court case
items.title_zh: 塞拉利昂四名因童婚而被拘留的男子出现在具有里程碑意义的法庭案件中
items.desc_en: It relates to a 17-year-old girl - four men including her father and husband face years in jail if convicted.
items.desc_zh: 这起案件涉及一名 17 岁女孩，如果罪名成立，包括她父亲和丈夫在内的四名男子将面临数年监禁。

items.title_en: Supra Player
items.title_zh: Supra Player
items.desc_en: Compare & Sync Videos Fast
items.desc_zh: 快速比较和同步视频

items.title_en: Trump eases pressure on Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh as inflation tops 4%
items.title_zh: 通胀率突破4%，特朗普缓解了对美联储主席凯文·沃什的压力
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump's economic advisers are giving Warsh space as the new Fed chairman on interest rates as the president repeats calls to cut.
items.desc_zh: 在总统再次呼吁降息之际，唐纳德·特朗普总统的经济顾问正在为新任美联储主席沃什提供利率空间。

items.title_en: Christmas market attacker jailed for life for murdering six in Germany
items.title_zh: 德国圣诞市场袭击者谋杀六人被判终身监禁
items.desc_en: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.
items.desc_zh: 2024 年，塔勒布·阿卜杜勒莫森 (Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen) 开车进入市场时，导致一名 9 岁儿童和 5 名妇女死亡。

items.title_en: Senior Ukrainian intelligence official jailed for life for spying for Russia
items.title_zh: 乌克兰高级情报官员因为俄罗斯从事间谍活动被判终身监禁
items.desc_en: Col Dmytro Kozyura agreed to share state secrets and systematically disclosed classified information, prosecutors say.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，德米特罗·科济拉上校同意分享国家机密并系统地披露机密信息。

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: The abundant but expensive energy source that's under your feet
items.title_zh: 你脚下丰富但昂贵的能源
items.desc_en: Start-ups are taking fresh approaches to geothermal energy, but will the economics work?
items.desc_zh: 初创企业正在采取新的地热能方法，但经济有效吗？

items.desc_zh: 适合每台 Mac 的私人刘海工作区

items.desc_zh: 将您的 Mac 变成时光机。

items.desc_zh: 将任何 Excel 文件变成实时仪表板

items.desc_en: Sell subscriptions to teams, companies, and organizations.
items.desc_zh: 向团队、公司和组织出售订阅。

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。

items.title_en: GTA 6 - all you need to know about Rockstar's blockbuster game
items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_zh: LockIn MCP

items.desc_zh: 当您需要锁定时，让 AI 为您屏蔽干扰

items.desc_zh: 您的 24/7 私人人工智能代理

items.title_en: Scientist publishes fresh doubts over Microsoft's quantum claims
items.title_zh: 科学家对微软的量子主张提出新的质疑
items.desc_en: The tech giant has consistently stood by its Majorana chip research despite scepticism from some experts in the field.
items.desc_zh: 尽管该领域的一些专家持怀疑态度，但这家科技巨头始终坚持其马约拉纳芯片研究。

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘
items.desc_en: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。

items.title_en: Nada
items.title_zh: Nada
items.desc_en: Compose music with just your voice
items.desc_zh: 仅用您的声音创作音乐

items.title_en: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
items.title_zh: 谷歌 YouTube 与青少年就社交媒体成瘾案达成和解
items.desc_en: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.
items.desc_zh: 这位 15 岁的原告对另外三家科技巨头的诉讼将于下个月开始。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We're at one of Europe's biggest tech events.
items.desc_zh: 我们正在参加欧洲最大的科技活动之一。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: note.md

items.desc_zh: 您的笔记和研究文档现在是本地法学硕士记忆

items.title_en: How 100 hospitals switched to pen and paper to defeat a national cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。
